ast.name: description
ast.source: When studying a specific note from the dashboard, show all its cards regardless of daily limits
ast.target: 从仪表板学习特定笔记时，显示其所有卡片，不受每日限制

ast.name: description
ast.source: Display inline flashcard counts (new/learning/review) next to [[links]] that point to notes with flashcards
ast.target: 在指向包含闪卡的笔记的[[链接]]旁显示内联闪卡计数（新/学习/复习）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Display donut indicators next to links inside flashcard panel cards
ast.target: 在闪卡面板卡片内的链接旁显示环形指示器

ast.name: description
ast.source: Display donut indicators next to links during review sessions
ast.target: 在复习会话期间的链接旁显示环形指示器

ast.name: description
ast.source: Display global due/new/learning card counts in the bottom status bar
ast.target: 在底部状态栏显示全局到期/新/学习卡片计数

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hour when a new day begins (0-23). Default: 4 (4:00 am)
ast.target: 新一天开始的小时（0-23）。默认值：4（凌晨4:00）

ast.name: description
ast.target: 显示答案，然后评级为良好

ast.name: description
ast.source: Start an HTTP server for CLI integration when the plugin loads
ast.target: 插件加载时启动HTTP服务器以进行CLI集成

ast.name: description
ast.source: Local API port (default: 27182). Restart Obsidian after changing.
ast.target: 本地API端口（默认：27182）。更改后请重启Obsidian。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Install the True Recall skill for Claude Code to control flashcards from the terminal
ast.target: 为Claude Code安装True Recall技能，以便从终端控制闪卡

ast.name: description
ast.source: Merge changes from other devices when the plugin loads
ast.target: 插件加载时合并来自其他设备的更改

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose where AI requests are routed

ast.name: description
ast.source: Your own API key — you pay OpenRouter directly per token.
ast.target: 您自己的API密钥——您直接向OpenRouter按令牌付费。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reasoning model used for flashcard generation.
ast.target: 用于闪卡生成的推理模型。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fallback model used when a plugin-specific LM Studio model is not set
ast.target: 当未设置插件特定的LM Studio模型时使用的备用模型

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional — only needed if you enabled authentication in LM Studio
ast.target: 可选——仅在您在LM Studio中启用了身份验证时才需要

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional — many local setups don't need authentication
ast.target: 可选——许多本地设置不需要身份验证

ast.name: description
ast.source: Used only by AI Flashcard Generation when LM Studio is the selected provider.
ast.target: 仅当选择LM Studio作为提供程序时，由AI闪卡生成功能使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Generate new flashcards from a note. Write one prompt per preset — pick a note type and the pipeline fills its fields.
ast.target: 从笔记生成新闪卡。为每个预设编写一个提示——选择一个笔记类型，然后流程将填充其字段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Export review history and card progress
ast.target: 导出复习历史和卡片进度

ast.name: description
ast.source: Replay review history to preserve your progress
ast.target: 重放复习历史以保留您的进度

ast.name: description
ast.source: Import .apkg decks with AI-assisted deck classification, field cleanup, and automatic note type mapping. Also exports your True Recall cards back to Anki while preserving FSRS scheduling data.
ast.target: 导入.apkg牌组，支持AI辅助的牌组分类、字段清理和自动笔记类型映射。同时将您的True Recall卡导出回Anki，并保留FSRS调度数据。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Run freeform prompts instantly without a preview step
ast.target: 立即运行自由格式提示，无需预览步骤

ast.name: description
ast.source: Transform flashcards mid-review or inside the Add Flashcard modal — fix formatting, simplify wording, or run your own custom instructions. Each preset can auto-apply or show a preview, and supports its own hotkey during review.
ast.target: 在复习过程中或添加闪卡模态框内转换闪卡——修复格式、简化措辞或运行您自己的自定义指令。每个预设可以自动应用或显示预览，并在复习期间支持自己的快捷键。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Polish presets work in review and in the Add Flashcard modal.
ast.target: 润色预设在复习和添加闪卡模态框中均有效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Used only by Card Polish when LM Studio is the selected provider.
ast.target: 仅当选择LM Studio作为提供程序时，由卡片润色功能使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Embed True Recall dashboards directly in your notes as codeblocks. Includes global due/new/learning counts, analytics (streaks, heatmaps, workload), project overviews, FSRS forecasts, and per-note health widgets.
ast.target: 将True Recall仪表板直接作为代码块嵌入您的笔记中。包括全局到期/新/学习计数、分析（连续记录、热力图、工作量）、项目概览、FSRS预测以及每个笔记的健康小部件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create flashcards by masking regions of images. Draw rectangles and ellipses over diagrams, maps, or any image to test visual recall.
ast.target: 通过遮罩图像区域创建闪卡。在图表、地图或任何图像上绘制矩形和椭圆以测试视觉记忆。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 文件更改时自动重新索引

ast.name: description
ast.source: Also index flashcard content alongside notes
ast.target: 同时索引闪卡内容和笔记

ast.name: description
ast.target: 跳过这些文件夹中的笔记

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sections under these headings won't be indexed in daily notes (one per line)
ast.target: 这些标题下的部分不会在日记笔记中被索引（每行一个）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Chat with your notes using RAG-powered AI. Index your vault, ask questions, and get answers grounded in your own knowledge.
ast.target: 使用RAG驱动的AI与您的笔记聊天。索引您的知识库，提出问题，并获得基于您自己知识的答案。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show inline status donuts next to [[wikilinks]] that reveal flashcard review state at a glance. In reading mode you also get text count indicators, and hovering a link opens a tooltip with full note stats.
ast.target: 在[[wikilinks]]旁显示内联状态环形指示器，一眼即可了解闪卡复习状态。在阅读模式下，您还可以获得文本计数指示器，将鼠标悬停在链接上会打开一个包含完整笔记统计信息的工具提示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Buttons shown when selecting text in the markdown editor
ast.target: 在Markdown编辑器中选择文本时显示的按钮

ast.name: description
ast.source: Buttons shown when selecting text outside the editor (sidebars, terminal, reading view)
ast.target: 在编辑器外选择文本时显示的按钮（侧边栏、终端、阅读视图）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Buttons shown when clicking an image in the editor
ast.target: 在编辑器中点击图片时显示的按钮

ast.name: description
ast.source: A floating toolbar that appears above selected text or clicked images, with quick actions for flashcard creation, AI generation, and image occlusion. Works in editor, reading mode, and side panels; the button set is fully configurable.
ast.target: 一个浮动工具栏，出现在选中的文本或点击的图片上方，提供用于创建闪卡、AI生成和图片遮挡的快速操作。适用于编辑器、阅读模式和侧边面板；按钮集完全可配置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show due, new, and learning card counts directly in Obsidian's status bar with color-coded indicators. Click the widget to jump straight into your dashboard without breaking flow.
ast.target: 在Obsidian的状态栏中直接显示到期、新建和学习中的卡片数量，并带有颜色编码指示器。点击小部件可直接跳转到您的仪表板，不中断流程。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Type-in mode used when a new review session starts (T still cycles modes in-session)
ast.target: 新复习会话开始时使用的输入模式（T键在会话中仍可切换模式）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search query — topic or concept to find
ast.target: 搜索查询 — 要查找的主题或概念

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get current study status: cards due today, reviews completed, correct rate, time spent, card collection breakdown (new/learning/young/mature/suspended), and answer streaks. Use for questions about today's session, due cards, or collection overview.
ast.target: 获取当前学习状态：今日到期卡片、已完成复习、正确率、花费时间、卡片集合细分（新建/学习中/年轻/成熟/已暂停）以及答题连击。用于询问今日会话、到期卡片或集合概览的问题。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get FSRS analytics: true retention (actual vs target, trend), workload forecast (predicted reviews per day, peak days), and card distributions (interval, stability, difficulty). Use for deep analytics questions.
ast.target: 获取FSRS分析：真实保留率（实际与目标对比、趋势）、工作量预测（每日预测复习量、峰值日）以及卡片分布（间隔、稳定性、难度）。用于深度分析问题。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Analyze study patterns over the last 30 days: best days of week, best hours, and a day/hour heatmap of review activity and success rates.
ast.target: 分析过去30天的学习模式：一周中最佳学习日、一天中最佳学习时段，以及复习活动和成功率的日期/时段热力图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Analyze a study session in detail: every card reviewed with ratings, which notes were studied, cards the user struggled with (rated Again), retention rate, and per-note breakdown. Works for today or any past date.
ast.target: 详细分析一次学习会话：每张复习过的卡片及其评分、学习了哪些笔记、用户感到困难的卡片（评为“重来”）、保留率以及按笔记细分的数据。适用于今天或任何过去的日期。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today if omitted.
ast.target: 日期，格式为YYYY-MM-DD。如果省略，则默认为今天。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get daily statistics for a date range. Returns reviews completed, new cards studied, time spent, and rating breakdown (again/hard/good/easy) for each day. Use for questions about past days, yesterday, last week, specific dates, or historical trends.
ast.target: 获取日期范围内的每日统计数据。返回每天完成的复习数、学习的新卡片数、花费时间以及评分细分（重来/困难/良好/简单）。用于询问过去几天、昨天、上周、特定日期或历史趋势的问题。

ast.name: description
ast.source: General-purpose assistant for your knowledge base

ast.name: description
ast.source: Best for educational content, helping you grasp new concepts and skills efficiently
ast.target: 最适合教育内容，帮助您高效掌握新概念和技能

ast.name: description
ast.target: 将笔记浓缩为关键要点

ast.name: description
ast.source: Test your knowledge with questions from your notes
ast.target: 用笔记中的问题测试您的知识

ast.target: 每天引入的最大新卡片数

ast.name: description
ast.target: 每天最大复习量（0 = 无限制）

ast.name: description

ast.target: 卡片被标记为“水蛭”前的失误次数（0 = 禁用）

ast.name: description
ast.source: What happens when a card exceeds the leech threshold
ast.target: 当卡片超过水蛭阈值时会发生什么

ast.name: description
ast.target: 逗号分隔的延迟，例如 1, 10 = 1分钟然后10分钟

ast.name: description
ast.source: Order in which new cards are introduced

ast.name: description
ast.source: How new cards are interspersed with review cards
ast.target: 新卡片如何与复习卡片穿插

ast.name: description
ast.target: 复习之间的最大天数。默认值：36500

ast.name: description
ast.source: Order in which review cards are shown

ast.source: Target probability of recall at review time
ast.target: 复习时的目标回忆概率

ast.target: 首次评分为“重来”时的初始稳定性

ast.target: 首次评分为“困难”时的初始稳定性

ast.target: 首次评分为“简单”时的初始稳定性

ast.name: description

ast.target: 首次评分为“良好”时的初始难度

ast.target: 将卡片转移到现有笔记
